## reference · Google AI search guide AEO GEO is still SEO crawlability
* AEO and GEO are still considered SEO
* Google's new AI search guide emphasizes the importance of crawlability
* AI search results can be influenced by prompt control groups and GA4 tracking
* Accurate location information is crucial for multi-location brands in AI search
* Content architecture may be a bottleneck in delivering personalized experiences
* Measurable pipeline and revenue impact can be achieved by using AI in specific areas
* Guides are available for SEO, Core Web Vitals, Google E-A-T, Link Building, Local SEO, On-Page SEO, and Ranking Factors
* Resources include SEJ Live, webinars, rundowns, library, ebooks, SEJ podcast, and Google algorithm updates
Sources: https://www.searchenginejournal.com/googles-new-ai-search-guide-calls-aeo-and-geo-still-seo/575026/
